data.body: ROUND 2 — browser-verified fixes (commits a2be0572, 2c66b1c7, c4b4cb60, +docs). Joe's in-browser review found the editor non-functional; root-caused via a NEW Playwright tier (real headless Chromium): (1) properties panel crashed at render ('debounceFn is not a function' — KindEntry didn't pass the debounce service), killing selection + group expansion; FIXED. (2) single column / no arrows — bpmn-auto-layout stacks our event-free nested IR vertically with 0 edges; DROPPED it and rewrote _emit_di as a real layered layout (longest-path x, stacked y, docked edge waypoints, EXPANDED sub-processes sized to contain children). (3) edits didn't persist (the testaroo loss) — was a side-effect of the crash; now an in-panel config edit persists to the IR on Save (browser-verified). Added 'Action (uses/prompt)' panel field. NEW real-browser E2E tier (tests/e2e/test_editor_browser.py) asserts edges render, no overlaps, panel reacts, edit persists — self-skipping. All editor/e2e tests green. Docs corrected (layout is ours, sub-processes expanded inline). READY for Joe's re-review.
